Dear Ryan,

Thank you for contacting Laya Healthcare regarding the status of your claim CLM-950666. We understand that you are inquiring about the current status of your diagnostic scan claim under policy number POL-IE-938403.

At this time, we are unable to provide you with an update on the status of your claim as the policy associated with this claim has expired. We kindly ask that you renew your policy before submitting any new claims or queries.

For more information on how to renew your pol

Dear Aoife,

Thank you for submitting your claim for the dermatology consultation on 22 July 2025 at Beacon Medical Centre. We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

However, we regret to inform you that your policy, HealthWise Gold (POL-IE-161255), has expired on 25 July 2025. To submit a claim, please ensure your policy is active and renewed.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and will be happy to assist you with any renewal queries or information you may require.

Best rega

Dear Eoin,

Thank you for submitting your identification documents to verify your account details. We appreciate your prompt response.

To ensure the security of your account, we will process your verification request as soon as possible. In the meantime, you can manage your policy and submit claims through our Member Area or Laya App.

Dear Conor,

Thank you for bringing your payment issue to our attention. To help us resolve this matter, could you please provide us with your Member ID or Policy Number? This will allow us to verify your identity and process your payment accordingly.

Once we have this information, we will follow up with you as soon as possible.

In the meantime, if you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to contact us at [support_email] or call us at [support_phone].

Dear Liam Murphy,

Thank you for contacting Laya Healthcare regarding your renewal notice. We understand that the premium amount may have increased compared to the previous year. Based on the information available in our system, you are currently enrolled in the 'Select Hospital' plan with policy number POL-IE-197573, which is set to renew on May 8, 2025. If you would like to explore other plan options, you can visit our Member Area at https://www.layahealthcare.ie/memberarea/howtousememberarea

Dear Conor,

Thank you for contacting Laya Healthcare regarding your claim for an antibiotic prescription on 31 May 2025 at Liffey Pharmacy. We appreciate your interest in submitting this claim under your Essential Care policy (POL-IE-689107).

However, we regret to inform you that your policy has expired on 12 April 2025. To submit a claim, please renew your policy first. Once renewed, you can easily submit your claim through our Laya App or Member Area 24/7.

We apologize for any inconvenience

Dear Eoin,

Thank you for bringing your billing concern to our attention. To help us better understand and resolve the issue, could you please provide your Member ID or Policy Number? Once we have verified your identity, we will follow up with you promptly.

In the meantime, if you have any health-related questions, please don't hesitate to contact our Laya Healthcare Concierge team at concierge@layahealthcare.ie or call us at 1800 200 500.

Your Laya Healthcare Team

Dear Cian,

Thank you for contacting Laya Healthcare regarding the status of your claim CLM-598077. Based on our records, your policy POL-IE-238205 is currently expired. To submit a claim or check the status of an existing claim, please renew your policy first.

You can easily renew your policy online through the Member Area at https://www.layahealthcare.ie/memberarea/howtousememberarea. For assistance with renewing, please refer to the 'Renewing your policy' section in the 'Manage your policy'

Thank you for contacting us regarding the addition of Conor McCarthy as a dependent on your policy. In order to process your request, we require the following information:

- The relationship of Conor McCarthy to the policyholder.

Please provide this information as soon as possible so we can update your policy accordingly. Once received, we will confirm the addition and provide you with any necessary documentation.

Thank you for contacting us regarding your renewal notice. We understand that the premium amount has increased compared to the previous year. Dear Liam Murphy,

Thank you for submitting the additional documents for case CASE-266850. We appreciate your prompt response.

Your policy, POL-IE-249550, is currently in an expired status. To renew your policy and maintain coverage, please log in to your Member Area at https://www.layahealthcare.ie/memberarea/howtousememberarea and follow the steps to renew.
